title: rhadiourgia #4468
definition:
1) ease in doing, faculty
 2) levity or easiness in thinking or acting
    2a) love of a lazy effeminate life
 3) unscrupulous, cunning, mischief
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) ease in doing, faculty
 2) levity or easiness in thinking or acting
    2a) love of a lazy effeminate life
 3) unscrupulous, cunning, mischief

    NASB:  ease in doing, laziness, recklessness, hence wickedness:
